statement: In every magma, Equation 2827 (`x = ((y * z) * (w * y)) * y`) implies Equation 971 (`x = y * ((z * y) * (z * w))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0677
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op w y)) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z y) (op z w)))
